entries.title: Homily on Acts 10 on acts 4:18
entries.excerpt: "And they called them, and commanded them not to speak at all, nor teach, in the name of Jesus." See what effrontery is shown by these, and what greatness of mind by the Apostles.

entries.title: Homily on Acts 10 on acts 4:18
entries.excerpt: "And they called them, and commanded them," etc. It had been much better for them to let them go.

entries.title: Commentary on Acts on acts 4:18
entries.excerpt: Yet they do not lead the apostles before Pilate as they did Christ, but they themselves judge: first indeed affected by shame and modesty, then fearing for fear that they too be accused by these concerning him.
